patch.value: pm copy <id>: clone an item to a new ID with optional title override
Agents re-create same-shape items (recurring audits, template issues) by re-specifying all fields. pm copy clones non-lifecycle fields into a fresh open item.
pm copy <id> [--title] [--status open] copies type/priority/desc/body/tags/parent/assignee/etc.; resets id/status/timestamps/close fields; history notes source; MCP contract.
